title: AT Field Shield Frequency
wikitext:
[]: A.T. Field Shield Frequency?             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Sep 21, 2011 11:54 am A couple of days ago, I was watching Star Trek:Generations to pass the time. Yes, I'm a Star Trek fan, and I have no shame in it. Anyway, one particular scene got me to thinking of Evangelion, specifically, the nature of the A.T. field. In the movie, the Dura sisters manage to determine the Enterprise's Shield Modulation Frequency by planting a camera of some sorts in Geordi's Visor. Because of this, they where able to modify their torpedoes to match the frequency of the shields so that the torpedoes would pass through them like they weren't even there. Here's a link to the scene I was referring to, since I couldn't find any images that would help state my point: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m1HYce-HrQU&feature=related[/url] At 00:13-00:18 is where the particular scene happens. Now, this reminded me of Asuka's climatic battle with the Mass Produced, where one of them threw their blades/Lance of Longinus at her A.T., where it seems to briefly struggle with hers, until it finally passed through the A.T. field like it wasn't even there. Now, this got me thinking: Is it possible that the A.T. field works something along the same principles of shields as those in Star Trek? That an A.T. field has a specific "A.T. frequency", depending upon the user? Perhaps this gives us some insight as to how the Lance works to penetrate A.T. Fields. When the Lance came into contact with Asuka's A.T. field, it briefly struggled with it. Perhaps, at that point, it was "scanning" the frequency of her A.T. field, and then "modified" its own frequency to match her's, so it would pass through it like it wasn't even there?. Does this seem like a plausible explanation? If it does, this could provide some insight in how to successfully attack an Evangelion. You wouldn't be able to break through an A.T. field, but perhaps you can go around it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 21, 2011 12:07 pm There's a short discussion about it here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4616 but it didn't get that far. The idea behind shield frequencies in Star Trek is similar to the propellers in old airplanes. You have to set it up to modulate at a frequency so that your guns can shoot through them. In the case of an energy modulation, your weapons can shoot through your own shields while others just get canceled out. Theres a few lines in the show like "It's neutralizing the phase space!" which tend to point to ATF's being waves or modulating in some way, with the side effect of being able to change said modulation to cancel out another ATF. But it's not the same thing as shields in Star Trek.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Sep 21, 2011 12:13 pm I think some people have stronger AT fields than others, but a frequency? Not so sure. Also the Lance could just as easily be the initial resistance change between air and AT Field, and probably is.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 21, 2011 12:29 pm The AT Field is a projection of the soul. It doesn't necessarily have a "Frequency" as nothing can break it but an equally strong AT Field or ungodly amounts of concussive force. The strength of an AT Field seems to be determined by the will or resolve of the user, so it's basically magic.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Sep 21, 2011 12:37 pm AuraTwilight wrote: The AT Field is a projection of the soul. It doesn't necessarily have a "Frequency" as nothing can break it but an equally strong AT Field or ungodly amounts of concussive force. The strength of an AT Field seems to be determined by the will or resolve of the user, so it's basically magic.

[]: A.T. field = highly picky people. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Sep 21, 2011 3:37 pm xanderkh wrote: That maybe true. But don't forget Arthur C. Clark's Third Rule: "Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic"

[]: Re: A.T. field = highly picky people. Bl             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Sep 21, 2011 3:43 pm Alaska Slim wrote: This isn't "truly" technology though, it's a biological construct that everyone has as a given, the Evas only project theirs from the pilots. There isn't a bit of technology to the Angels, who also have them. Despite how oddly Fuyutsuki refers to Sachiel in the first episode about "operating alone" and all that. The quote is probably more applicable to the moons or the spears or the Evas themselves, which indeed, are given religious significance by SEELE.

[]: Re: A.T. field = highly picky people. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Sep 21, 2011 4:49 pm xanderkh wrote: Apologizes. I merely referred to that rule in an attempt to be slightly humorous. Apparently it didn't work.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Wed Sep 21, 2011 6:12 pm CJD wrote: I think some people have stronger AT fields than others, but a frequency? [..]

[]: Re: A.T. field = highly picky people. Bl             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Sep 21, 2011 7:06 pm Alaska Slim wrote: But this entire topic is born from a joke, taking Star Trek: Generations seriously . It's pretty much a given that everything is up for scrutiny. On that note, Sfdebris is the man .

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Thu Sep 22, 2011 12:40 am Doppler shifts consist of two: red shifts represent a stellar object moving away from the earth, and blue shifts means the object coming to earth. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blueshift Higher frequencies exist within the blue portion of the visible spectrum and beyond (UV, microwaves, gamma rays). http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Visible_spectrum blue: 631–668 THz (frequency) 450–475 nm (wavelength)

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Sep 22, 2011 4:49 pm It's an interesting idea that an AT field would have a frequency but I would have to agree with AuraTwilight. But it still may be possible considering how an Eva expanding it's AT field could neutralize an angel's AT field.
